newPlaces.description: Surf spot with instructors & equipment rentals, also popular for chilling out at sunrise & sunset.

newPlaces.description: Swimming, climbing & cliff jumping in & around a partially submerged grotto surrounded by mangroves.

newPlaces.name: Magpopongko White Beach
newPlaces.description: This majestic, white sand beach features tidal pools at low tide, giant sea stacks & water sports.

newPlaces.name: Mines View Observation Deck
newPlaces.description: Busy spot with an observation deck for scenic views of town & abandoned gold & copper mines.

newPlaces.name: Lion’s Head
newPlaces.description: Landmark statue of a lion's head standing 40 ft. tall on the side of a mountain road.

newPlaces.name: Heritage Hill and Nature Park Garden (Old Diplomat Hotel)
newPlaces.description: Abandoned hotel, long considered haunted, with ghost-hunting tours & hilltop views.

newPlaces.description: Restaurant set in a rainforest garden, renowned for hot chocolate & traditional Filipino cuisine.

newPlaces.description: This bustling town plaza features a monument to Father Jose P. Burgos, plus food kiosks.

newPlaces.name: Kiltepan View
newPlaces.description: Hilltop lookout point known for panoramic sunrise views over surrounding mountains & rice terraces.

newPlaces.name: Hanging Coffins of Sagada
newPlaces.description: A trail through tropical vegetation leads to dozens of wooden coffins secured to a sheer cliff face.

newPlaces.name: Rice Terraces of the Philippine Cordilleras
newPlaces.description: Almost every inch of this scenic mountainside has been cut for rice paddies since ancient times.
